Description: Complete KPI & Data Insight Catalog for HIVR Platform

KPIs.Label: Deal → Proposal Rate
KPIs.Computation: COUNT(Deals with Bookings stage >= proposal) / COUNT(Deals)

Domains.Name: Bookings & Proposals
Domains.Description: Proposal lifecycle, booking stages, and function space utilization

KPIs.Label: Space Utilization Rate
KPIs.Computation: Booked slots / Available slots per venue

KPIs.Label: Attrition At-Risk Rooms
KPIs.Computation: Blocks past cutoff with low pickup

Domains.Name: Revenue & Deal Economics
Domains.Description: P&L evaluation, NIV, displacement, risk adjustments

Domains.Name: Behavioral Analytics
Domains.Description: Historical behavioral rates, priors, overrides, and account profiles

KPIs.Label: Declining Accounts
KPIs.Computation: Companies with >= 30% revenue drop period over period

KPIs.Label: Avg Response Time
KPIs.Computation: AVG time between inbound and next outbound in thread

KPIs.Label: Response Rate
KPIs.Computation: Inbound threads with outbound reply / Total inbound threads

KPIs.Label: SLA Compliance Rate
KPIs.Computation: Responses within SLA window / Total responses

Domains.Name: Operations & Process
Domains.Description: Pipeline velocity, stage durations, deal aging, responsiveness scores

KPIs.Label: Overall Responsiveness Score (0-100)
KPIs.Computation: Weighted average of engagement speed across cycle stages

KPIs.Label: Revenue per Rep
KPIs.Computation: SUM(Value WHERE Stage=Won) GROUP BY OwnerId

KPIs.Label: Low Activity Reps
KPIs.Computation: Reps with < threshold emails in period

KPIs.Label: Slow Response Reps
KPIs.Computation: Reps with avg response time > SLA

KPIs.Label: Below-Avg Win Rate Reps
KPIs.Computation: Reps with win rate < team avg - 1 std dev

Domains.Name: Demand & Inventory
Domains.Description: Demand calendar, compression, and inventory management

KPIs.Label: Peak Demand Days
KPIs.Computation: COUNT days with highest demand level

Domains.Name: Tasks & Automation
Domains.Description: Task management, agent execution, and workflow performance

KPIs.Label: Overdue Tasks
KPIs.Computation: COUNT(DueDate < NOW AND Status NOT IN (Done,Canceled))

Domains.Name: Housing & Guest Management
Domains.Description: Room lists, guest profiles, and housing operations

KPIs.Label: Upcoming Arrivals (7D)
KPIs.Computation: COUNT(CheckInDate within 7 days AND Status IN (Tentative,Confirmed))

KPIs.Label: Revenue per Venue
KPIs.Computation: SUM(Value WHERE Stage=Won) GROUP BY VenueId

GlobalDimensions.Description: Filterable dimensions available across most KPIs

Types.Label: KPI Card
Types.Use: Single metric with delta and sparkline
